subcodes.first_line: Y H W H. Lo, He hath come down from the heaven of utterance with clear and manifest proof, and hath summoned all unto the Most Exalted Horizon. Blessed are they that comprehend [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ی ه و ه انه اتی من سمآء البیان ببرهان مبین و دعا الکل الی الافق الاعلی طوبی للعارفین
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to Jews, @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @personal instructions, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution
